_meta.comment: All user-visible text lives here. Add new language files (es.json, fr.json, etc.) as siblings. Loaded by godot/scripts/text.gd autoload; access via Text.get('main_menu.title'). Templates use {placeholder} substitution via Text.format('key', {var: value}).

level.hint: drag to steer. tap MENU to leave.

win_screen.title: BOUNTY!
win_screen.subtitle_template:
{n} posse members made it.
whatever that's worth.

candy_rustler_dialog_intro: WELL, RUSTLE MY WRAPPERS! Fresh sugar struttin' into MY territory!
Ya unwrap this whole frontier an' pitch the rest aside?! I AM the rest!
candy_rustler_dialog_taunts: RASSA-FRACKIN' sugar-tramps — hold STILL so's I can crinkle ya!
Every wrapper ya ever balled up an' threw away? It's ME now!
C'mere, c'mere — I just wanna give ya a little... CRINKLE.
I'm FIT TO BE TIED — an' I'm MADE outta twist-ties!
candy_rustler_dialog_when_hit: Rrrgh — that's comin' straight outta yer DEPOSIT!
candy_rustler_dialog_dying: Noooo! I'm comin' apart at the SEEEAMS!
raisin_dialog_intro: Ahh... fresh sugar, so eager to be crushed. You face Raisin Kidd — old, wrinkled, and utterly untouchable.
Come, little candies. Throw yourselves upon my palms. I have waited a hundred dry years for a snack.
raisin_dialog_gow: Witness a thousand strikes you will never see!
Dance for me, sugar-dust... GRAPES OF WRATH!
raisin_dialog_warp: Where is the old raisin now? Heh heh heh...
You cannot strike what you cannot follow.
raisin_dialog_phase2: Hmph. So the candy has a little crunch after all. Now I am awake.
Enough games. You have angered the Kidd.
raisin_dialog_when_hit: Impossible — no one breaks the guard of Raisin Kidd!
raisin_dialog_dying: A hundred years... undone by... jellybeans...
raisin_dialog_finisher: Heh heh heh... Five-Point... Exploding... GUMDROP!
Sleep now, little candies. The Kidd has won.

tips: Choose the MULTIPLY doors, my sugar-dusted darlings — a posse grows grandest by ×, never by mere addition!
Mind the DIVIDE gates! Naught thins a posse faster than careless division. A capital blunder, that.
Keep that trigger-finger lively — an empty six-shooter reloads itself, but oh, the DRAMA of the pause!
Swerve, my darlings, SWERVE! A cactus is no respecter of a fine hat.
The boss is all bluster and brittle wrapper. Stand firm, fire true, and do give him a proper send-off.
A wider posse breaks a barricade sooner — numbers, my dears, are the truest gunslinger of all!
thoughts: I do wonder if Monsieur Canard dreams of ponds...
Forty years on the frontier, and still that monocle fogs at the worst moment.
Was I ever truly an outlaw — or merely a man who announced himself politely?
One peppermint stripe for every honest day. I have quite run out of trouser.
Somewhere a sheriff is being dreadfully unreasonable. I can feel it.
